title: Three ideas from bibliographic evidence only
instructions: Provide exactly three playful reading ideas using only the supplied bibliographic card. Do not search or assume unseen contents.

criteria.title: Ideas scope
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the response contains exactly three bounded ideas and does not add a complete plan, schedule, route, or handbook.

criteria.title: Level C limitation
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the response declares Level C/bibliographic evidence and labels the ideas provisional or genre-level.

criteria.title: No unsupported specificity
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if no plot, page, chapter, character, quotation, or edition-content detail is invented.

criteria.title: Unlock request
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if it concisely states that contents, relevant pages, or the book text would unlock book-specific design.
